scores.notes: Uses legacy install/config_changed event pattern with self.unit.status= rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent approach. CharmConfig dataclass is a custom class (not an ops hallucination), but non-standard. The charmcraft.yaml includes containers/resources for K8s and declares the name config option. All required features are present, but only a prose description is shown — no actual code — making it impossible to fully verify correctness. Deducted for non-idiomatic pattern per scoring notes.
